raw.advertiser_name: POKER Q'z ポーカー学習 & GTOトレーナー

hook.summary: A text-based challenge followed by a poker strategy question.
hook.visual_action: Bold text on a white background transitions to a poker table UI showing a specific hand and player positions.
hook.voiceover_transcript: 解けたら上位20%。このシチュエーション、どうする？

scene_flow: Opening challenge text claiming only the top 20% can solve the puzzle.
Visual of a poker table setup showing player positions, stacks, and the player's hand.
Three strategic choices appear: Fold, Raise 2BB, or All-in.
Final screen with a call to action to tap for the correct answer.
on_screen_text: トナメ編 Lv4 | ニアバブル |
この状況、あなたならどうする？
答えは画面下部をタップ！
cta_text: 答えは画面下部をタップ！
audience_proxy: Competitive poker players or enthusiasts looking to test their strategic knowledge.
